geographic_restrictions: Global (United States and more than 35 countries)
project_area: Biotechnology innovation, medical and scientific breakthroughs, patient advocacy, policy advocacy, and industry development
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to organizations and companies in the biotechnology sector
eligibility_summary: Open to biotech companies, industry leaders, state biotech associations, and organizations united by the goal of developing medical and scientific breakthroughs to prevent and fight disease, restore health, and improve patients' lives. Membership is available for startups, non-R&D companies, and human health-focused entities.
